title: MEDIATION - 211info
text: NEIGHBOR-TO-NEIGHBOR YAMHILL COUNTY MEDIATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mediation through a voluntary and confidential process where people with disputes come together, sit down with a neutral third-party mediator, and discuss ways to solve the dispute. Can assist with landlord/tenant disputes. A juvenile victim/offender mediation program is also available. Offers periodic Small Claims Mediation Trainings for mediators and those committing to volunteer at small claims court mediations. 237 NE Ford Street Suite 6 McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-2pm Email (503) 585-0651 201 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 585-0651 Ext: 4 Main phone Main phone (503) 585-0651 ext 201 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Juvenile Delinquency Diversion Counseling Landlord/Tenant Dispute Resolution Mediation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBOR-TO-NEIGHBOR YAMHILL COUNTY
